(__WEBPACK_EXTERNAL_MODULE__uxasset_externals_servicenow_ui_core_index_jsdbx_65e0859f__["default"]["default"] ? __WEBPACK_EXTERNAL_MODULE__uxasset_externals_servicenow_ui_core_index_jsdbx_65e0859f__["default"]["default"] : __WEBPACK_EXTERNAL_MODULE__uxasset_externals_servicenow_ui_core_index_jsdbx_65e0859f__["default"]) : __WEBPACK_EXTERNAL_MODULE__uxasset_externals_servicenow_ui_core_index_jsdbx_65e0859f__;

				} });","import { createCustomElement } from '@servicenow/ui-core';
import snabbdom from '@servicenow/ui-renderer-snabbdom';
import styles from './styles.scss';

/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *
 * x-gegis-library-banner
 * A configurable banner / callout (info | warning | error | success).
 *
 * FULLY OWNED markup. No now-alert (pulls library-translate → "process is not
 * defined"), no now-icon (bundled version renders blank on the instance).
 * SVG icons are rendered as JSX <svg> elements — snabbdom handles them
 * natively with no innerHTML hacks. Text is plain JSX children.
 * Documented §5 exception.
 * ------------------------------------------------------------------ */

/* Inline SVG icon paths (24 × 24, Material-style). */
const ICONS = {
	warning: 'M1 21h22L12 2 1 21zm12-3h-2v-2h2v2zm0-4h-2v-4h2v4z',
	error: 'M12 2C6.47 2 2 6.47 2 12s4.47 10 10 10 10-4.47 10-10S17.53 2 12 2zm1 15h-2v-2h2v2zm0-4h-2V7h2v6z',
	info: 'M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm1 15h-2v-6h2v6zm0-8h-2V7h2v2z',
	success: 'M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm-2 15l-5-5 1.41-1.41L10 14.17l7.59-7.59L19 8l-9 9z',
	check: 'M9 16.17L4.83 12l-1.42 1.41L9 19 21 7l-1.41-1.41z',
	clock: 'M12 2a10 10 0 100 20 10 10 0 000-20zm.5 5H11v6l5.25 3.15.75-1.23-4.5-2.67z',
	help: 'M11 18h2v-2h-2v2zm1-16a10 10 0 100 20 10 10 0 000-20zm0 18a8 8 0 110-16 8 8 0 010 16zM12 6a4 4 0 00-4 4h2a2 2 0 114 0c0 2-3 1.75-3 5h2c0-2.25 3-2.5 3-5a4 4 0 00-4-4z',
};

/* JSX SVG element — no innerHTML, snabbdom renders SVG natively. */
const Icon = ({ iconKey, color, size }) => {
	const d = ICONS[iconKey] || ICONS.info;
	return (
		<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width={size} height={size} fill={color} aria-hidden="true"
			style="display:block;flex-shrink:0">
			<path d={d}></path>
		</svg>
	);
};

/* type → color palette */
const TYPE = {
	info: { color: '#1d6fe0', bg: '#eaf2fd', border: '#cfe0fb', iconKey: 'info' },
	warning: { color: '#b5640a', bg: '#fdf6e8', border: '#f3e2bd', iconKey: 'warning' },
	error: { color: '#c8283c', bg: '#fdeef0', border: '#f6ccd3', iconKey: 'error' },
	success: { color: '#1a7f4b', bg: '#e9f7ef', border: '#bfe8cf', iconKey: 'success' },
};
const typeOf = (t) => TYPE[t] || TYPE.info;

const view = (state, { updateState, dispatch }) => {
	if (state.dismissed) return <span></span>;

	const { type, title, line1, line2, line3, line4, icon, dismissible, linkLabel, linkHref, expandable } = state.properties;
	const t = typeOf(type);
	const iconKey = (icon && ICONS[icon.replace(/-(outline|fill)$/, '')]) ? icon.replace(/-(outline|fill)$/, '') : t.iconKey;
	const lines = [line1, line2, line3, line4].filter((l) => l && String(l).trim() !== '');
	const collapsed = expandable && !state.expanded;

	return (
		<div className={`bn bn--${type || 'info'}`} role="status"
			style={`background-color:${t.bg};border-color:${t.border}`}>

			<span className="bn-lead">
				<Icon iconKey={iconKey} color={t.color} size={20}></Icon>
			</span>

			<div className="bn-body">
				{title ? <div className="bn-title" style={`color:${t.color}`}>{title}</div> : null}

				{lines.length ? (
					<div className={`bn-lines${collapsed ? ' bn-lines--clamp' : ''}`}>
						{lines.map((l, i) => (
							<div className="bn-line" style={i ? 'margin-top:10px' : ''}>{l}</div>
						))}
					</div>
				) : null}

				{expandable && lines.length > 1 ? (
					<button className="bn-toggle" type="button"
						on-click={() => updateState({ expanded: !state.expanded })}>
						{state.expanded ? 'Show less' : 'Show more'}
					</button>
				) : null}

				{linkLabel && linkHref ? (
					<a className="bn-link" href={linkHref}
						on-click={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); dispatch('BANNER_LINK_CLICKED', { href: linkHref }); }}>
						{linkLabel}
					</a>
				) : null}
			</div>

			{dismissible ? (
				<button className="bn-dismiss" type="button" aria-label="Dismiss"
					on-click={() => { updateState({ dismissed: true }); dispatch('BANNER_DISMISSED', {}); }}>
					×
				</button>
			) : null}
		</div>
	);
};

createCustomElement('x-gegis-library-banner', {
	renderer: { type: snabbdom },
	view,
	styles,
	initialState: { dismissed: false, expanded: false },
	properties: {
		type: { default: 'warning' },
		title: { default: '5 Potential duplicates found' },
		line1: { default: 'The system has identified the following submissions as potential duplicates based on insured details, address, line of business, and exposure criteria.' },
		line2: { default: 'Review and determine whether to proceed or decline.' },
		line3: { default: '' },
		line4: { default: '' },
		icon: { default: '' },
		dismissible: { default: false },
		expandable: { default: false },
		linkLabel: { default: '' },
		linkHref: { default: '' },
	},
	actionHandlers: {},
});
